schema.description: Takes a poorly written or incomplete bug report and returns a structured version with title, reproduction steps, expected and actual behavior, suggested severity, and a list of missing evidence. Does not invent missing facts.
schema.name: improve_bug_report

context.description: Optional additional environment or context info (versions, OS, browser, build number, etc.).

format.description: Output format. 'markdown' for human consumption, 'json' for downstream tooling.

raw_text.description: The original, unstructured bug report text.
